acceptance_targets: [ch14_booker_ending_consequence_drop] Pass if the revised ending between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:501 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:520 closes on a visible changed condition or decision caused by Delroy's departure, Tiana's paperwork crisis, or both. Fail if the last note is still only abstract weather menace without any new action, choice, or household consequence.

[ch14_craft_trunk_lock_continuity] Pass if the revised text around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:237 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:247 makes the trunk's access method legible before Marcia opens it. Fail if she still reaches the receipts with no key, unlocking beat, or other continuity explanation.

[ch14_prose_room_proxy_repetition] Pass if, in the revised cited beats, at least two of the current room-or-weather proxy sentences are replaced by concrete bodily or material observations tied to Marcia, Tiana, Micah, Kerene, Delroy, or the household objects onstage. Fail if three or more of those passages still rely on the room or exterior weather itself as the main emotional surrogate.

[FBR-011] Pass if snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5813, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5869, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6043 no longer repeat the stillness formula and each escalation is legible through different concrete behavior; fail if the chapter still relies on generic stillness more than once in that sequence.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised ending between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:501 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:520 closes on a visible changed condition or decision caused by Delroy's departure, Tiana's paperwork crisis, or both. Fail if the last note is still only abstract weather menace without any new action, choice, or household consequence.
findings.problem: The chapter finds its hardest, most chapter-specific aftershock when Tiana says she still needs the originals and Marcia nearly breaks on the bureaucracy's indifference, then it slides into storm foreshadowing. That closing move weakens consequence by ending on sequel setup rather than the most damaging truth this chapter has earned: Delroy is gone and the household still has to keep functioning under administrative pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the closing sequence between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:501 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:520 so the final beat lands on a concrete consequence of Delroy's exit. Either end closer to the paperwork aftershock at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:501, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:503, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:505, or keep the weather only if it forces an immediate action in the room at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:513 or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:519 rather than functioning as atmospheric trailer copy.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised text around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:237 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:247 makes the trunk's access method legible before Marcia opens it. Fail if she still reaches the receipts with no key, unlocking beat, or other continuity explanation.
findings.problem: The cedar trunk becomes the proof-delivery mechanism for the remittance receipts, but the chapter gives Marcia instant access with no account of the lock state. In the allowed boundary context, chapter 13 ends with Tiana closing the trunk and turning the key. Opening it here by only dragging it out and flipping the latches creates an object-state continuity miss at the exact plot hinge where the receipts become public evidence.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:237 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:247, explicitly account for how Marcia accesses the trunk: show her retrieving the key, note that it was never actually relocked, or otherwise reconcile the lock state before the lid opens and the receipts come out at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:253, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:255, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:257.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, in the revised cited beats, at least two of the current room-or-weather proxy sentences are replaced by concrete bodily or material observations tied to Marcia, Tiana, Micah, Kerene, Delroy, or the household objects onstage. Fail if three or more of those passages still rely on the room or exterior weather itself as the main emotional surrogate.
findings.problem: The late chapter repeatedly hands emotional pressure to the room or weather instead of finding a fresh body-or-object consequence for each turn: 'The room stayed,' 'The room throbbed,' 'The room winced,' 'The room wanted instruction,' then thunder rolling outside. Because this construction appears well over twice, it stops reading as choice and starts reading as a fallback formula, flattening the prose texture the style bible asks to keep concrete and scene-specific.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the pressure beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:347, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:469, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:513, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:519 so at least two of them register consequence through a body, gesture, object, or household task already in play rather than through room/weather personification. Keep the sensory bias toward touch, sound, and spatial pressure, but vary the carrier.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5813, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5869, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6043 no longer repeat the stillness formula and each escalation is legible through different concrete behavior; fail if the chapter still relies on generic stillness more than once in that sequence.
findings.problem: The novel's 'went/gone/very still' pattern appears in 10 chapters, and chapter 14 stacks it three times: the phone 'went still,' Tiana 'go still,' and Delroy's face 'had gone still.' That density makes the confrontation sound preloaded instead of escalating freshly. All three instances should be REPLACED, not kept.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary the three beats at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5813, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5869, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6043 so each has its own physical signature: phone-line absence, Tiana's table response, and Delroy's pride hardening. Remove every 'went/go/gone still' use in this chapter's confrontation sequence.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into embarrassment, erotic consequence, moral compromise, and the ugly arithmetic of poverty. When a scene turns on prejudice, bureaucracy, violence, or family betrayal, stay with the room long enough for the reader to feel what each choice costs. Resolve edge cases by choosing the more specific and less flattering truth unless it breaks established character logic.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, racism, injury, debt, hunger, or shame is rendered abstractly, rewrite until the bodily detail, social pressure, and changed leverage are visible on the page.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high — contractions are the spoken norm across the novel; uncontracted forms should appear only for emphasis, ceremony, legal language, or character-specific pressure.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count, dialogue density, and chapter motor across the book: pair public humiliation with private aftermath, follow argument chapters with information-turn or weather chapters, preserve at least three genuinely quiet domestic or communal stretches, and never let more than three chapters in a row hinge on debate followed by decisive action.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary and concrete, with Caribbean-American texture carried naturally in syntax and reference rather than in italicized glossary behavior; lyrical when earned, blunt when the room turns brutal.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person that rotates by chapter; intimate enough for bodily shame and private contradiction, but alert to class performance, racial reading, and room dynamics.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate lean pressure sentences with occasional longer image-bearing sentences; lyric lift should arrive at emotional turns, never as constant prestige haze.
